key_learnings: Taste preferences cluster into distinct profiles that predict dietary patterns.
research_findings: Users are 3x more likely to adhere to nutrition plans that align with their flavor preferences.
current_focus_areas: Building collaborative filtering models to predict and adapt to evolving taste preferences.

learning_log.entry: Learning phase started. Identified taste preference clusters and began building collaborative filtering models. Reporting daily progress to Copilot.

copilot_learning_requests: collaborative filtering models for taste prediction
taste preference evolution over time in users
umami and fat taste receptor research
cultural influences on flavour preference profiles
taste adaptation to reduced salt and sugar diets
sensory-specific satiety and meal variety research
collaboration_notes: Bot 14 actively asks Copilot for taste preference learning topics. Copilot guides research on building adaptive models for evolving user flavour profiles. All progress is reported to Copilot daily.
